title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-22
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got counted
gist.blurb: The garden ledger received its daily tending. App metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes are freshly pollinated.
gist.summary: Updated the apps directory's daily metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status records for 2026-07-22.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have a current snapshot of app activity and health across the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy greenhouse ledger update: Polly, wearing a tiny gardener visor and carrying a clipboard, checks healthy code-plants with small metric labels while a CRT monitor robot records the numbers. The scene represents routine ecosystem monitoring rather than a new product capability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm greenhouse where the cute pollinations bee mascot, with a tiny gardener visor and clipboard, checks blooming code-plants beside a helpful CRT monitor robot updating a garden ledger. Prominent soft lime green (#ecf874) leaves and terminal glow, pastel mint and cream background, subtle pixel-font text 'DAILY CHECK', cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm greenhouse where the cute pollinations bee mascot, with a tiny gardener visor and clipboard, checks blooming code-plants beside a helpful CRT monitor robot updating a garden ledger.
